commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cb2cc021254b042be62f45370370fae3be826107)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves harness message types into agent-core, adds shared tsdown package output-root cleanup, updates related build tests, and narrows a future timestamp helper type predicate.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +26, Other +36. Total +89 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence current-main reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source and PR discussion identify the declaration-generation and tsdown cleanup paths, but the full warning-producing build log was not inspected.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR changes a compatibility-sensitive plugin API surface and the contributor proof still needs direct current-head warning-absence evidence.

target.title: fix(build): avoid stale agent-core dts warnings
target.body:
## Summary
- Move built-in harness message roles into the canonical agent-core message type surface so generated declarations no longer rely on relative module augmentation.
- Keep `src/agents/sessions/messages.ts` as a runtime re-export instead of declaring OpenClaw-only augmentations against agent-core internals.
- Add a shared tsdown package output-root helper and use it from both `tsdown.config.ts` and `scripts/tsdown-build.mjs`, so stale package declaration chunks are cleaned for every tsdown package without deleting unrelated package artifacts.
- Make the shared future-timestamp helper a type predicate so current main's auth-profile timestamp checks typecheck under fresh CI.

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/number-coercion.ts packages/agent-core/src/types.ts packages/agent-core/src/harness/messages.ts src/agents/sessions/messages.ts scripts/lib/tsdown-output-roots.d.mts scripts/lib/tsdown-output-roots.mjs scripts/tsdown-build.mjs test/scripts/tsdown-build.test.ts tsdown.config.ts packages/agent-core/src/harness/session/session.ts packages/agent-core/src/harness/compaction/branch-summarization.ts packages/agent-core/src/harness/compaction/compaction.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/number-coercion.test.ts test/scripts/tsdown-build.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/harness/messages.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` reported no accepted/actionable findings.
- Crabbox/Testbox: `tbx_01ksx331gmmm24dy707bmj8kgs`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26691868777, command exited 0.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: OpenClaw package builds should not leave stale tsdown declaration chunks behind, and generated agent-core declarations should not contain the relative augmentation warning that this PR set out to remove.

Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox launched through the OpenClaw Crabbox wrapper on PR head `cb2cc021254b042be62f45370370fae3be826107`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: From this branch, I ran a Crabbox/Testbox session with `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "set -euo pipefail; corepack pnpm check:changed; corepack pnpm build"`.

Evidence after fix: Copied live console output from the Crabbox/Testbox session:

```text
provider: blacksmith-testbox
leaseId: tbx_01ksx331gmmm24dy707bmj8kgs
slug: jade-crayfish
command: corepack pnpm check:changed; corepack pnpm build
build-all tsdown done in 86.0s
build-all phase timings: total 121.0s; slowest tsdown 86.0s
result: {"provider":"blacksmith-testbox","leaseId":"tbx_01ksx331gmmm24dy707bmj8kgs","slug":"jade-crayfish","commandMs":325515,"totalMs":330763,"exitCode":0}
CI artifact run: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26691868777
```

Observed result after fix: Testbox completed the changed checks and full build with exit code 0. The `tsdown` build completed without the earlier relative `declare module "../types.js"` or `declare module "../runtime/index.js"` generated-dts warnings, and the new tsdown clean test verifies only known tsdown package output roots are removed.

What was not tested: No manual app UI flow; this change is build/declaration cleanup and package output-root behavior.
